allow: PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/design/h/ASbZLgiCmta5lkOqmaR7mg?open_file=Loom.html" -MaximumRedirection 5; $content = $response.Content; Write-Output "Content Length: $\($content.Length\)"; Write-Output "First 3000 chars:"; Write-Output $content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(3000, $content.Length\)\))
